ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group the model belongs to (e.g., TLE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, deep learning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "released_by" TEXT /* User who released the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Additional information about the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the experiment was run on */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., precision, recall, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of the level (e.g., training, validation, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_metrics" (
  "level_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the level metric belongs to */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., precision, recall, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_metrics_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_group" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_group" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the metric type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metric_types" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_type_id")
)
